ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "preference" TEXT /* Preference of the user (e.g., asian, white, other) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user's account is active */,
  "user_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the demographic information belongs to */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the user (e.g., asian, white, other) */,
  "income" REAL /* Income of the user */,
  "education" TEXT /* Education level of the user (e.g., high school, college, university) */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the user */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user (city, state, country) */,
  "language" TEXT /* Preferred language of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the preference belongs to */,
  "preference_name" TEXT /* Name of the preference (e.g., music, movies, sports) */,
  "preference_value" TEXT /* Value of the preference (e.g., rock, action, football) */,
  "preference_strength" INTEGER /* Strength of the preference (e.g., 1-5 scale) */,
  "preference_category" TEXT /* Category of the preference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interests" (
  "interest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interest entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the interest belongs to */,
  "interest_name" TEXT /* Name of the interest (e.g., reading, hiking, coding) */,
  "interest_strength" INTEGER /* Strength of the interest (e.g., 1-5 scale) */,
  "interest_category" TEXT /* Category of the interest */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_types" (
  "user_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user type */,
  "user_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the user type (e.g., customer, admin, guest) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the role belongs to */,
  "user_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user type the role belongs to */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., manager, employee, guest) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the user started in the role */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the user ended the role (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_type_id") REFERENCES user_types ("user_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the campaign */,
  "campaign_type" TEXT /* Type of the campaign (e.g., email, social media, targeted ad) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_campaigns" (
  "user_campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user campaign entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the campaign is associated with */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the campaign */,
  "exit_date" TEXT /* Date the user exited the campaign (if applicable) */,
  "engagement_level" INTEGER /* Engagement level of the user with the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_campaigns_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_campaigns_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
